name: ledgr-transcripts
description: Blockchain academic transcript registry — Solidity contract + React/MetaMask dApp

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix contracts install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n chain,web -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix contracts run node" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && npm --prefix contracts run deploy && npm --prefix client run dev"
